creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text:
Comment on attachment 155526
www/firefox build log

> gmake[6]: Entering directory '/usr/ports/www/firefox/work/mozilla-release/obj-x86_64-portbld-freebsd10.1/layout/build'
...
> /usr/ports/www/firefox/work/mozilla-release/config/rules.mk:930: recipe for target 'Unified_cpp_layout_build0.o' failed

Did you forget to log stderr? There's no error message as for why the recipe failed, usually a compiler error.
